name: Inside Edge Golf
about: Inside Edge Golf is an indoor golf entertainment and training facility featuring aboutGolf PGA Tour Simulators with over 90 world-famous courses rendered in 3D graphics. The venue offers 9 simulators, including 2 Curve models, and provides game improvement technology with 3Trak data capture. It caters to golfers of all skill levels with amenities like private rooms, individually controlled HDTVs, and food and drink options. Pricing varies by time of day and simulator type, with discounts for leagues and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Sophisticated game improvement technology with 3Trak data
Flexible leagues and events with cash payouts
Ample parking and private rooms for group events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen with food options available
Full bar with food and drink options

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Bring your own clubs. They have a limited number of rentals available onsite.

faq.question: Can I bring food/drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink in the simulators. Counters are available outside each sim.

faq.question: How long for 18 holes?
faq.answer: Use 1 hour per person as a guide for 18 holes. Recommend 4 players per simulator to speed play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. Children under 12 must have an adult present at all times. Junior rates available.
